title: cajanus mareebensis
intro: Cajanus mareebensis, also known as Mareeb bean or Red gram bean, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cajanus mareebensis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and protect against cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
